# DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE - It is automatically generated
# See the `tools` folder in the mod's root directory

REPLACE:royal_navy_loc = {
	type = country
	text = { # Royal Navy
		trigger = {
			RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
		}
		localization_key = royal_navy_loc
	}
	text = { # [Adjectve] Navy
		trigger = {
			NOT = {
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
			}
		}
		localization_key = adjective_navy_loc
	}
}
